Thanks for sending a pull request! Please fill out the sections below. See

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? One or two short paragraphs. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Closes #456. Use "Refs #123" if this PR is related but does not close the issue. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Verification

Per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md), all three gates must pass before merge:

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:prod` passes

## Changelog

- [ ] Added an entry under `[Unreleased]` in [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md).
- [ ] N/A — not user-visible (refactor, test-only, or internal tooling).

## Screenshots / recordings

<!--
Required if this PR changes the look or behavior of any designer:
- agent.json (low-code agent)
- *.flow (Maestro Flow)
- *.bpmn (Maestro BPMN)
- caseplan.json (Maestro Case)
- action-schema.json (Coded App)

A short screen recording is preferred for interaction changes.
-->
